title.en: But soul attacks are unpredictable and difficul...

content.en:
"Not good!"

The faces of the three of them, including the Three Rat True Monarchs, changed drastically, and they all sensed Ye Tian's God Destroying.

But soul attacks are unpredictable and difficult to avoid.

"Block!"

The three of them used the Soul Defense Secret Technique, trying to block Ye Tian's attack.

However, Ye Tian's God Destruction was too terrifying, and Ye Tian's Divine Soul strength was much stronger than them.

From the point of view of cultivation, they are all at the peak level of the True Spirit Realm, but the strength of their divine souls is not as good as Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian's foundation is too solid, even if their cultivation is not high, their divine soul strength is not comparable to them.

Coupled with the power of the soul origin supernatural power, ordinary true monarchs can't stop it at all.

Puff puff puff!!

Among the three rat true monarchs, the wind rat true monarch and the golden rat true monarch had pale faces, their souls were cracked, and their breath dropped greatly, which was due to the heavy damage to their souls.

And the Blood Rat True Monarch was more miserable, his divine soul was the weakest, and the soul defense secret technique he mastered was also the worst, so he failed to stop Ye Tian's God Extermination, and was directly annihilated by a blow, and his body turned into a corpse, floating in the void.

"The third child!"

"The third child!"

The Wind Rat True Monarch and the Golden Rat True Monarch shouted with sad expressions.

The three of them are not real brothers, but a rat chaotic life race in Chaos, sworn brothers who work together to fight chaos and become famous, and their relationship with each other is even better than that of their own brothers.

But now, the Blood Rat True Monarch is dead.

"I'm going to kill you!"

The Wind Rat True Monarch and the Golden Rat True Monarch performed forbidden spells one after another, burning nearly half of their bodies and divine souls, and the breath of the whole person continued to recover to its peak state, and it was even stronger than the peak state.

"Kill!"

The Wind Rat True Monarch and the Golden Rat True Monarch held two half-way spears and rushed towards Ye Tian.

The power of the half-way weapon is terrifying, far surpassing the Chaos Arcana.

Moreover, the half-way device in their hands is not an ordinary half-way, it should belong to the medium half-way.

Ye Tian also had a half-dao weapon in his hand, but it was not a medium-grade half-dao weapon, just an inferior half-dao weapon.

The true monarchs basically have inferior half-dao weapons in their hands, and it is relatively rare to be able to have medium-grade half-dao weapons, as for the high-grade half-dao weapons, that is, the true monarchs on the list of true monarchs do not necessarily have them.

Ye Tian also wanted to buy a medium half-way weapon, but it was difficult to buy it, and occasionally he encountered a few medium-sized half-way weapons for sale, and they were not knives, so it didn't help him much.

"Blood River True Body!"

"Blood River Immortality!"

"Void Heaven Dao Body!"

Ye Tian added buffs to himself one by one, making his defense and recovery ability reach an incredible level.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian unleashed the second Origin Divine Power - Divine Power!

Rumble!!!

As soon as Shenwei came out, a terrifying gravitational impact directly shook the Wind Rat True Monarch and the Golden Rat True Monarch away.

At the moment when they were shocked, Ye Tian used the space-time transfer technique to move in front of them and slashed them with a knife.

The power of the Endless Avenue was blessed on the blade of the sword, and the eternal immortal fire covered this area.

Many methods were used together, so that the Wind Rat True Monarch and the Golden Rat True Monarch couldn't react at all.

In an instant, the Wind Rat Zhenjun was killed, and the Golden Rat Zhenjun was severely injured and dying.

"Impossible, you are only in the early stage of the True Spirit Realm, how can you have such terrifying combat power!!!"

The Golden Rat Zhenjun roared in confusion.

"Because you're too weak!"

Ye Tian replied.

In an instant, he completely annihilated the last vitality of the Golden Rat True Monarch with a single sword.

After killing the Three Rats True Monarch, Ye Tian collected their inheritance, and then went to slowly collect the 108 top-level innate origin things.

Soon, these lotus-like innate origin things fell into the small universe of Ye Tian's body.

Taking the opportunity, Ye Tian checked the treasures of the Three Rat True Monarchs by the way, but was surprised to find that the Three Rat True Monarchs had a very rich harvest, and there were about thousands of innate origin things on his body, but most of them were high-level innate origin things.

But even so, the value of these innate origin things is unimaginable.

"Killing people is really one of the fastest shortcuts to get rich, and it's no wonder that other true monarchs will fight so wildly, after all, killing a true monarch can be called a big rich!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But the murderer will always kill him, and no one knows whether he will fall prey to others.

Ye Tian will not take the initiative to hunt others, unless others come to hunt him, he will act as a hunter.

"Let's go somewhere else!"

Ye Tian's figure gradually faded and disappeared.

......

In the realm of the Boundary Source, around a peak similar to the Five Finger Mountain, a True Monarch appeared, the number of which reached millions, and on this land, there were countless traces of battles and the corpses of many True Monarchs.

If you count it carefully, at least more than 10,000 True Monarchs have fallen here.

These True Monarchs are basically true monarchs in the late stage or even the peak of the True Spirit Realm, but they are not ordinary true monarchs, what a fierce battle situation it is to fall so many true monarchs at once!

And many of the true monarchs in the sky were also quite embarrassed, and they were more or less injured.

Obviously, they've just been through a fight.

It's just that now they have stopped fighting one after another, and they have not continued to fight.

And the reason for the truce is very simple, there are a few real monarch bigwigs coming.

At this time, the eyes of many true monarchs were more or less on the four of them.

These four people are all true monarchs, and they are all relatively high.

No. 32 on the True Monarch List - God of War Tower, Shadow Zero True Monarch.

No. 64 on the True Monarch List - Immortal Gate, **True Monarch.

No. 72 on the list of true monarchs - Chaos Commercial Bank, True Monarch of the Sea.

No. 102 on the True Monarch List - Void Heaven Palace, Morning Light True Monarch.

Although the rankings of these four true monarchs are somewhat different, the difference in real combat power is not very large, plus everyone has hole cards, not necessarily strong if the ranking is high.

The ranking on the True Monarch list just shows that in the case of no treasures and no hole cards, the ranking is divided by its own attack power alone, but in fact, there are many factors in combat power.

Therefore, if you fully believe in the ranking of the True Monarch List, you are really asking for your own death.

Maybe some of the true monarchs at the end of the True Monarch List have the means to kill the true monarchs at the top of the True Monarch List with one blow.

With these four True Monarchs as the leader, and the other True Monarchs as auxiliaries, the war was temporarily suspended, just because this Five Finger Mountain was about to give birth to an innate origin thing.

This innate origin thing is too precious, which leads these true monarchs to fight.

I saw that the five fingers of Wuzhi Mountain showed a trend of closing, and there was a stone similar to a human shape in the center of Wuzhi Mountain, and the stone exuded an amazing origin aura, and a congenital origin thing was being bred inside.

If Ye Tian was here, he might feel that this stone was somewhat similar to the Monkey King in the myths and legends of the earth.

In fact, inside this stone is indeed giving birth to a life, a life of innate origin.

Under normal circumstances, there is no such thing as innate origin without life, but when the innate origin thing has the life force, it surpasses the top innate origin thing and becomes the innate origin life, also known as the super innate origin thing, and the value far exceeds the top innate origin thing.

Moreover, the Super Innate Origin Thing has a huge use, that is, it can help the True Monarchs condense the power of the prototype of the Great Dao, and even help them break the shackles of 99,999 meters and successfully cultivate a Great Dao completely.

Owning a Super Innate Origin Thing is equivalent to having a ticket to the True Ancestor!

That's why these true monarchs are so crazy.
